calibration.question:
Given the conversation context, evaluate this claim: 'Well, it's a little different. but if you're looking for something different, you can try gluten-free pasta. it's wheat-flavored and comes in a variety of textures and shapes. i really like the rice flour pasta'

What is the verification status?
A. Supports
B. Refutes
C. Not Enough Information
calibration.context: Do you like Pasta? I used to eat it every day about as a kid, so now I am a bit tired of it I love pasta! I could eat it almost everyday! Personally I like fresh pasta, but dried is fine too! Oh trust me, you do not want to do that, it gets old very quickly, I would know There are 310 specific forms though! That's almost one for every day of the year! Haha! Oh wow, I figured there were only a few. That is crazy, maybe I was too boxed in! Oh yeah! There's a ton of varieties! And if you get tired of the typical flour pasta, you can try pasta made from rice flour!  I have never tried that, I wonder how different the taste really is!
calibration.claim: Well, it's a little different. but if you're looking for something different, you can try gluten-free pasta. it's wheat-flavored and comes in a variety of textures and shapes. i really like the rice flour pasta
